title: DragN's XC Jumps!
body:
**XC Jumps** adds cross-country horse jumps and other decorations to Minecraft!

 

Jumps include logs, wooden rounds, oxers, ditches, and more. With over 20 types of new jumps, in varying styles, you’ll have plenty to decorate your course with!


Available Versions: 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1


Originally created for the Equestriem Minecraft server. Free to use for any server!

 
![Here's a wonderful showcase of XC Jumps 1.1 by Just Peachy!](https://youtu.be/NEKqhZpH-BY)


Need to report a bug, place a suggestion, or just want to chat about XC Jumps? Here’s our Discord! https://discord.gg/jbjMCEMA4g

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
